game.name: Sonic The Hedgehog 4: Episode II
game.desc: Sonic and Tails return in Sonic The Hedgehog 4: Episode II. This port runs the Android libfox.so natively through a Linux/SDL2 so-loader. BYO-data: copy your APK and cache ZIP/OBB to the sonic4ep2 folder; first launch extracts the required files.
